sentences.arabic: عَطَسَ زَيْدٌ كَثِيرًا فِي الصَّبَاحِ وَسَالَ أَنْفُهُ.
sentences.translation: Zejd je puno kihao ujutro i curdio mu nos.
sentences.translationEn: Zayd sneezed a lot in the morning and his nose ran.

sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ إِلَى الصَّيْدَلِيَّةِ وَطَلَبَ دَوَاءً لِلْأَنْفِ.
sentences.translation: Otišao je u apoteku i tražio lijek za nos.
sentences.translationEn: He went to the pharmacy and asked for nose medicine.

sentences.translation: Farmaceut mu je dao kapi za nos.
sentences.translationEn: The pharmacist gave him nose drops.

sentences.translation: Koristio ih je i osjetio poboljšanje za nekoliko sati.
sentences.translationEn: He used them and felt improvement within hours.
